title: Ichnanthus cynotis
taxonomy: Ichnanthus cynotis is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the tribe Paniceae and the genus Ichnanthus. The family Poaceae is a large and diverse group of monocots, commonly known as grasses. The tribe Paniceae includes various species of grasses, many of which are found in tropical and subtropical regions. As part of the genus Ichnanthus, Ichnanthus cynotis shares characteristics with other species in this group, which are primarily found in the Americas.
